# single-header libs

These are vendored individually because they're each shipped as a single
header file (not a real library project). All public-domain or
permissively licensed via in-header notices.

| File | Origin |
|---|---|
| `dr_mp3.h` | David Reid, https://github.com/mackron/dr_libs (wraps minimp3 by lieff) |
| `dr_flac.h` | David Reid, https://github.com/mackron/dr_libs |
| `dr_wav.h` | David Reid, https://github.com/mackron/dr_libs |
| `stb_image.h` | Sean Barrett, https://github.com/nothings/stb |
| `stb_image_resize2.h` | Sean Barrett, https://github.com/nothings/stb |
| `stb_vorbis.c` | Sean Barrett, https://github.com/nothings/stb |

License notices are at the bottom of each file.
